headline: Apple is hiking the prices of MacBooks and iPads due to the memory chip shortage
summary: Apple has hiked prices on some of its most popular products, including the MacBook and iPad, because of the rising costs of memory and storage chips sparked by the AI boom.

raw.summary: Apple has hiked prices on some of its most popular products, including the MacBook and iPad, because of the rising costs of memory and storage chips sparked by the AI boom.

headline: Can Target's New Assortment Lift Back-to-School Sales This Year?
summary: Target's back-to-school push blends exclusive collaborations, owned brands, deals and AI-driven shopping tools to win students, parents and teachers.

headline: Women-Owned Cookie Mix My Better Batch Lands Kroger, Albertsons, H-E-B, and Hy-Vee as Brand Posts 400%+ Year-Over-Year Growth
summary: My Better Batch, a fast-growing, premium cookie mix that tastes homemade, is reporting 400%+ year-over-year growth in one of the most impressive retail expansion stories in the emerging CPG space. The brand added more than 3,000 new points of distribution in the first quarter of 2026 and is on track to hit 6,000 by end of month. New placements include Kroger, Albertsons, H-E-B, Giant Food, Hy-Vee, and Harris Teeter, building on an existing footprint that already includes Target, Thrive Market, T

headline: How much grocery CEOs earned in 2025
summary: The top executives of the nation’s largest publicly traded food retailers all scored multimillion-dollar pay packages last year, with Doug McMillon of Walmart atop the list.

headline: Chart of the Day: Target’s Risk/Reward Is Improving
summary: While  Target  faces stiff competition from retail giants  Amazon  and  Walmart  the stock offers a compelling combination of value, income, and recovery potential.  Shares showed relative strength on Tuesday, holding up well despite a challenging tape that pressured many consumer and retail names.  Investors are also paid to wait via an attractive dividend yield, while management continues to leverage Target’s nationwide store footprint, strong private-label brands, and omnichannel capabilities.

headline: Wolfe Research Turns Bullish on Target (TGT), Cites Improving Execution
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the Top 10 Blue Chip Stocks with Growing Dividends. On June 23, Wolfe Research upgraded Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to Outperform from Peer Perform. It also assigned a $162 price target to the stock. Analyst Spencer Hanus also named the stock a top pick through the end of the year. […]
